reviews.review_text: This game was my childhood, its a very good and chill games, after 100%ing it I can declare this game peak

This is how a game should be made, fun game-play and well optimized.
They don't make them like this anymore.
10/10

Growing up and watching so many people play this game, I've always wanted to play it. Now that I am, It's so incredibly fun and cute! The first time I opened the game I almost cried tears of job. Anyway, Slime Rancher is an awesome game and I love it to death ;v;

What can I say? You feed the slimes and sell their ♥♥♥♥. It's lots of fun.
Loved this game as a kid, and still love this game to this day. Highly recommended!
My favorite game is Slime Rаncher. It's a truly relaxing and enjoyable game, so you can play it without stress. I think it deserves better. Thank you, Monomi Park, for such a wonderful game.

Playing back when i was kid in 2018, and still have the same memory. 

it's a good chill game to play, I found it quite calming to play and I'm able to play for hours admiring all the cute slimes all in all its a cozy open slime world game
this is a fun game with lots of different slimes to explore with, i like that you can unlock new areas to finnd new foods and habitats.
it's such a refresher to play a calm ranching game where almost everything isn't that hard to take care of after playing a game that makes me stress tf out.

This game is a gem. I've loved it forever- the designs are all so cute, and it's overall a fantastic and wholesome game. It's for sure something you have to be willing to put some time into and look around inside, but the payoff is always worth it. 5 stars, No comments.
This is the one of the if not the best game i have bought on steam i just started playing again 2 days ago a and i have 17.5 hours clocked i would highly recommend.
An absolutely great game, never seems boring no matter how many times, I start a new save. First time I ever played it was through a friend, it was worth buying so I can play it whenever.

This game is really fun! i often lose track of time when playing since there's always something to keep you busy. collecting the different slimes is very fun and making your own largo combinations is pretty satisfying. This game is great if you like simulator games (as that's literally what this game is), it isn't too heavy on the story aspects (they're pretty optional) so if you're not into that it's fine. I'd say customization is decent, especially later in the game where you can place decorations around your ranch. but yeah, great game, would recommend to anyone who likes fun and casual simulators!!
I love this game, easy but complex gameplay. Very calming game aswell, no extremely hard puzzles or bossfights. Perfect if you want a grinding and calming game.
Very Fun, I am not usually a big fan of this genre but this game pushes beyond its genre and is probably in my top 10. 4.5/5 stars.

this is an amazing game
i love kidnapping and force feeding innocent and unsuspecting slimes
i hate those stupid tars
stupid tars eat my slime
more stupid tars
murder tars
my slimes are gone
why do they always go after the highest value slimes
anyways
this game is great and high quality even though my computer is trash
i like the style of the game
and its quite original
Game was so fun! The slimes are so cute and the farming is so fun. I bought the game and only closed it 5 hours later because of a tiny bug. Best game I have played in a long time!

I used to play this on Xbox when I was younger, and seeing it on sale made me immediately add it to my cart and purchase it. So if you need an honest review, here's mine.

The gameplay is immersive, and I enjoy the collecting, caring, buying, and automating parts of it all, even the parkour, And although it's often the same tasks, of collecting or selling, there's a variety of different areas to explore, and collect the resources, or slimes. And there's ALOT of automation junk for those that like grinding all that out, (I'm getting to it), but personally, I want to collect every slime, just because it is an achievable goal. 

However, the map layout is confusing at times, I've found myself searching up videos of people actually playing through those sections - but maybe I'm just thick - and I think some thing should be communicated more clearly. For example, the treasure pods, I remember being so upset about not knowing how to unlock them, because it's stuck behind a paywall, and I didn't know that the lab even existed!

But if you're more perceptive, it probably won't be a problem.

All of the slimes are adorable - I have a favourite, Mosaic, you're all wrong if you don't think so - and I'd say easy to take care of, but only if you follow what they need through you're handy dandy little guide. All of the tutorials are helpful, although you MUST read it all slowly, and don't run about while one if running, because you will need to run back if you want it to disappear - annoying ! - but despite, especially listen to them if you're a first time player.

The dangerous slimes, most notably tarr slimes - which isn't even an issue if you play on the casual mode - and aggressive slimes aren't really a danger, unless you're out of stamina or low on health... or maybe you're distracted by something shiny. In most cases you can run, or jetpack out of there and everything will be dandy.

Although I think this games major flaw lies in the completion. No new content or anything... until you play on rush mode. I LOVED this mode on Xbox, it was awesome, I recommend it so much but only AFTER your first FULL playthrough. But The whole game is something to play, and explore until you drop,

It's been awesome falling back in love with this game, (even if I should be revising - oops)
Amazing game! Popularity is well-deserved, replayability is a little limited but you can easily rack up dozens of hours just exploring and going for new discoveries.

I played this game on Xbox when it was on gamepass but now I get to play it without having to play it on Xbox since its not on gamepass anymore but I love the game mechanics and how you can merge different slimes into one big one to get two different ports from the merged slimes!

very cute game, excellent for stress relief
can see some people finding the gameplay tedious but its absolutely perfect for me to just chill

only downside is that i get very mad that i cannot squish the slimes irl 0/10 game

I really enjoy playing this game, its super chill and fun to explore.
You can also download mods, there are various of mods for you to use. 
If you want to use co-op, just download Multiplayer mod SRMP
Самая лудшая раслабляющая игра которая затягивает своим геймпеям, в игру интересно играть от начала до конца, не разу не было скучно 10/10

THIS GAME IS SOOOOO CUTEEEE I LOVE IT. I loved making different slime combos and exploring to the end and playing with friends is also so much funnnnn. I've watched my childhood youtuber play this game when I was little and I finally had the chance to play and it was such a fun experience, I recommend this game if you like cutesy stuff C:

before i got this on steam, i owned this on playstation 4
and i racked up so many hours in it on there.

this game is such a nice
fun
relaxing game to just chill on

absolutely recommend

also -- BANGER SOUNDTRACK
ACTUALLY LIKE GO LISTEN TO THE SONGS
THEY ARE GREAT
Beautiful game to be honest this is my first playthrough on steam and for sure not my last

This game (Slime Rancher) is super cosy and really fun! You can enjoy every part of this game, also has a very fun gameplay loop!

P.S: When you unlock jetpack you can skip a slime key door and get into the moss blanket by going from one of the wooden dock pillars (no energy upgrade required).

This game is nothing like anything I've ever played besides maybe a roblox game. This game is very different than my usual pallete of games, however, that in no way made me turn a blind eye towards it. Starting off is actually very simple and easy to grasp and I wasnt needing to look up any sort of guides for most things (not that I use guides.) For how in depth this game can be, it is still all around quite simple to understand. Mechanically this game plays very well and I quite enjoy the gameplay loop of it as everytime I thought things were getting repetitive the game threw something new at me like a new area to explore, new content with other farmers or simply a new slime. The artstyle is nothing to downplay and I find it very "cute." Everything is well made and I love everything that comes with the game and highly recommend it to anyone needing a sort of grindy game 7/10

100% this game a while ago and forgot to review it. 
When I was younger, I used to watch gameplays of this game ALL the time, and it would've been my favourite game if I had a PC/modern console (at the time) to play it on.
After FINALLY getting my hands on a PC a few years later, I was searching trough Steam Offers and you know it was a no-brainer for me to buy this game for 5 bucks.
I got inmediately hooked. The gameplay loop is basically keeping balance between taking care of your ranch, feeding your slimes to get plorts and selling them for cash, and exploring in order to find more profitable slime species, which helps you obtain better gear in order to adventure in further and so on.
There's also a laboratory, in which you could create cosmetics and even upgrades at the cost of some materials, like specific slime plorts, which disincentivizes you from ditching your "worse" slimes.
However, what I loved the most was when, later in the game, you could get robots to automate your ranch, and it felt very rewarding to organize your ranch in such a way so that the game basically played itself.
To sum up, this is one of my favourite incrementals ever made, and I belive it's an absolute MUST for people who like funny number go up games (like Stardrew Valley). I'm now 100% the sequel, I'll prob leave a review for that game as well when I complete it.
BTW, I left out the (probably) most important stuff, so that you can discover them while you play.
I love. I love the slimes and the wa hoo's and the tarrs and hunters and the style is so pretty and omg I love this game so so so much
this is such a fun game. i play this all the time. it has cool grafics, a cute design and fun noises!! i would recommend this to the people who like adventure and tycoon!
Very very cool game. the style feels pretty old  with the square game screen but at the same time is something refreshing and new. 10/10

Cozy and relaxing.

Stressed out? Raging at a game? Grinding too hard? Play Slime Rancher. You can take your time with the game and just enjoy it for its chill gameplay.

* Capture slimes. Feed them. Sell plorts. Repeat.
* There's no time limit or time sensitive main plot lines. You do have daily requests that expire in 24 hours (in-game time).
* Staying awake for 24 hours or 72 hours or 10 days or 20 days does not punish you.
* Jumping into the ocean will knock you out and send you back home. You also lose whatever was in your inventory.
* There's no story. You only get tad bits of lore for the characters but not for the planet or the slimes.
* Use another slime's plort to make a largo slime. By feeding the main slime, you get double the plorts. Phosphor + Tabby = Cuberry for favorite food since Phosphor will be the main slime. Be careful not to add another plort or else you'll get a Tarr.
* Watch the market and sell when the price is high enough.
* Midgame: More plots = more work. Drones come in handy when unlocking the Lab.
* Once you hit the credits, you might stop and move on to another game.
* RNG can be a real pain when trying to get certain materials for your gadgets.
* Guide dang it! for the treasure pods. If you find one, the map doesn't even mark it for you.


Score: 9/10. Buy it on sale. Nice and chill game, but endgame leaves a lot to be desired.

I enjoy how this game keeps me interacted with it by trying to finish all the quests and feeding all the big gordo slimes, most games I cant play for long and get bored of. With this game I dont!

Cute, cosy game. Nice calming atmosphere and squishy slimes
Still really good even 10 years after release

This experience has a strange talent for making small victories feel incredibly important. Things that would normally mean nothing suddenly become reasons to celebrate. At one point I was genuinely proud of something so insignificant that I would never admit it in public. Thankfully, nobody was watching. Probably.
SQUISHY SLIME AND COLORS!! HOW COULD YOU EVER GO WRONG WITH THAT. in all seriousness, such a cute relaxing game. 8/10
I truly like the farming aspect and adventure, however I did sometimes get lost on what I had to do to progress. Still, pretty cute experience, and great quality for price relationship.

Slime Rancher is by far the best open world ever designed. Every part of this game is near perfection in its execution, from the visual design, soundtrack, gameplay, to the little minigames you complete for the other ranchers. If you have any interest in this game, I suggest you give it a try.

This is a well polished great game. It has all the mechanics you'd need to have this idle feeling yet, you still get to explore the entire area. The lore is not too fleshed out but that's not a big deal. The minigames, rush mode, and even the main game itself feel great. Using a gun to suck up slimes is a great subversion of expectations.
One of cutest games, highly recommend to play if you like slimes and chill.
I didn't expect this game to be so addicting! Also probably one of, if not the most chill games I've ever played. Cant wait to beat & %100 it so i can play the second game next!

Amazing game, very cute and relaxing. Just like any other solo-player game

Reduces Cortisol and puts your mind at ease

WHY THE ♥♥♥♥ DO GOLDEN AND LUCKY SLIMES SPAWN WHEN I DON'T HAVE FOOD.
Anyway 10/10 game would farm and automate again

Cute and cozy first person farmer, where you squeeze every single buck out of your slimes to buy upgrades, gardens and a lot more.
Some things could be faster, like stashing items or withdrawing them especially in the endgame.
Super fun game!!! Kid friendly game which is recommend for all ages too. There's so much to do, build and see. BEST GaMe OF ALL!!!!!!! Thanks
This game is SOOOO adorable!!! Catch, collect, and take care of your slimes in your cute little ranch. Such a dream, definitely recommend for anyone that is open to trying something new!!
i have played this game an unhealthy amount. this is such an addicting game, very much worth the 20 dollars. sequel's fun too.
Slime Rancher is addictive. I enjoyed the pace and all the play was exciting and fun. Just be prepared to lose a few hours!
this is the cutest game ever and i would play this game again and again until my bones disintegrate or my controller dies, no im not exaggerating, yes you should play this

A very fun and cute game well worth the price. It's cozy but adventurous in all the right ways, and building up your ranch and advancing feels very rewarding. I didn't find as much pleasure in the parts regarding technology and blueprints but I understand how it could be attractive to some people who like streamlining things. You're welcome to explore at your own pace and the world feels very open with lots to explore. All in all a great game.
Adorable, fun, and just the right amount of puzzling. Gotta Ranch 'em All!
absolutley gorgeous game. no doubt. cute, satasfying, relaxing, and has plenty of content. I'm near the end and I'm already sad :)
Ive beaten the game on xbox before, and its great. Playing it again on pc is very fun, will be buying slime rancher 2 once i get the chance.

Really Fun. Chill vibe and gameplay but just enough to challenge you. One thing though is that I wish treasure pods where handled alittle diffrent, but its a minor nit pick, especially since i havent played the sequel that may have improved upon this.
But again this is a great game if you like the farm manegment genre with some intresting platforming mechanics added in, especially for such a low price with sales.
Very fun game. 100% achievements takes you through the entire game and isn't too difficult.

I see plorts of green, red pogos too;
I see them bloom, then largos chew.
And I think to myself, "What a wonderful game!"

I see slimes of Pink; Hen-Hens of white.
The glass-blazing day; the Phosphorful night.
And I think to myself, "What a wonderful game!"

Those Awful Ravenous Rainbows; so rowdy as they smile.
While angry are the ferals, they're creeping in an aisle.
I see Tabbies booping heads, saying, "How do you do?"
They're really saying, "I love you."

Hear them hunger'n whine; I feed them full.
I'll earn much more than they'll ever know
And I think to myself, "What a wonderful game!"
Yes, I think to myself...


"What A Wonderful Game!"
Ooh, yeah.



so anyway, I 100% recommend this game and its sequel
and for formality sake, my poem's a Louis Armstrong parody
really good game very enjoyable and it feels like u always get the help needed when u get stuck
Fun game and quit moddable. base game is simplistic compared to the sequel but still an enjoyable time.
Honestly an amazing game, I cannot recommend this more if you're in for a relaxing time.
Wonderful and beautiful game. It is my go to whenever I need to relax.
it's a good chill game to play I found it quite calming to play I'm able to play for hours admiring all the cute slimes all in all its a cozy open slime world game

this game, is a gift from the gods, nothing could be greater, than this said game, i could've never thought i would ever come across this game, until now, this game changed my life in amazing ways no one else could

I found the game very addictive, but after 15 hours of playing, I started hating the game. However, later on, I started to like the game again. The game feels like you can't really leave your base too much because you are constantly taking care of your slimes, so progress can be really slow.

this game highly reminds me of my childhood and now that im older i can do things in this game better, brings back a lot of memories for me. i will cry if i think about it to long though

puddle slimes are the cutest, argue with the wall
the absurb amount of homoeroticism in this game was certainly unexpected but im really not complaining
peak game, its fun and simple, just got a litle boring in the endgame but after i got the end credits i decided to take it a quit, its a good experience, would definetely recommend it

Its the perfect chill game. Cant wrap my head around how a game so perfect goes on sale for so cheap. Cute little guys, easy to understand mechanics, and you can play whenever you want. I still stand by the plort market holding up better than the current US economy. Check this game out.
mods are really fun and the generic game is also REALLY cool
It's Honestly quite fun to Collect slimes and exploit them for Profit
A GREAT COZY GAME, and if you want isnt cozy but an amazing aventure game, i love it the aestethic and the loveble slimes (my favority is Tabby)
yet another game i bought but never ended up playing, cannot really blame the game for that though and it was fun while i did play it.

This game has a ton of content. It is a classic that is still worth palying, even with the release of slime rancher 2. It took me 9 hours to complete the story, without looking anything up. However, I am far from done with my farm, and I plan to continue playing until i get all achievements. 

The visuals in this game are still quite appealing, playing it doesnt feel like playing an outdated game.

This game is a 10/10, Wooliest approved.
Cute, polished, and fun. More automation options, more icons on the map, and less grindy extra missions would've taken it up a level. Overall, pretty good, but I didn't slime my pants over it.
Great game have 70+hours on Eg and bought it here just for the achievements. Chill game would 100% recommend.
I recommend this game because i am currently recommending it! Buy it now, no lag and it runs well on highest graphics
Very fun achievments are easy if you know what you're doing except for rush made overall I've had a very fun time playing slime rancher and i would 100% reccomend it to other players
literally the best game ever and nexus mods make it just that more fun

Personally this is one of my favorite games. I always used to play it on my xbox one before I got my laptop. It's a cute little farming sim with a little sprinkle of lore and a ctuesy map. Saber slimes are the cutest
never thought I would have developed parental instincts for slimes out of all things but here I am..... those slimes are my children and I would do EVERYTHING to protect them

Slime Rancher's biggest strength is how well it executes on the aesthetic it's aiming for. It's really easy to become completely immersed in the cute and cozy fantasy world Monomi Park has built. Because of this, you hardly notice when the story is disconnected from gameplay, or when the progression slows down at times, and those facts really didn't impact my enjoyment of the game.

[h1]Rating: 7/10 -Decent[/h1]

I've had this game in my library for years and I finally decided to finish it. It's a simple and chill farming game. You explore the world, find new slimes and sell their plorts. That's the simple gameplay loop. You can combine slimes to save some space on your ranch. The ranch layout is fixed but has plots where you can either place a corral for the slimes or a garden to grow their food. You can even build a silo to store some items. You can play the game at your own pace. You can either focus on your ranch or focus on exploring the whole world. Give it a shot. It's a fine game and was very popular back in the day.

The most chill i've ever felt while playing a game. There are soooo many ways to approach this game as your progress'll result the same at some point of the game, no matter how you approach it. Whether you play slow or speedrun the ♥♥♥♥ out of it, this game is a BaNgEr rawrawrr
absolutely love this game, 100% on my console a few years ago, still bought cause of how much i love this game. peak.

This is a marvelous and quite adorable game! I had a lot of fun collecting and raising different slimes. I've always thought slimes were a cute common game enemy, and I love that there's a game where I can raise the little guys! Highly recommend to anyone looking for a nice, chill, but still fun game to play. And don't worry, if you're looking for a bit of challenge, there are some pretty challenging achievements  you can strive for (if you want).

i Love this game - like genuienly, you can merge them using the shards they poo out with another slime to create fusion. this game is too big to learn everything in 3 hours. my tip is: Go play the demo and explore (PS: play close attention to your surroundings when you wander out)
Awesome game. Don't do what I did, don't try to make a million dollars without the side quest people, it's a lot easier when you have those late game upgrades.
one of the first games I played ever played and it did not disappoint I recently started playing it again its its just as good the gameplay and story is just incredible

Slime rancher is really damn fun!
The modding capabilities are pretty good and add up to the fun meter
100%'ing the game wasn't that difficult and overall is a nice experience
The locations are amazing, the music fits every single one
Worth playing
Very cute ranching game, a joy to play if you ever get the chance, especially with the multiplayer mod

this game is great the slimes are so cute and its fun to collect them
:D
Fun grinding simulator game. Yea and cute too
A cute and addictive game. This game showed just how much i really like enslaving otherworldly creatures.

An adorable slime collection game that's impossible not to smile at. Exploring the world, discovering new slime types, and building your ranch is genuinely relaxing and rewarding. The perfect comfort game.

So yeah, I haven't played a ton but this is that one game, what do I mean? Simply put it's the game I grew up watching (the playthrough was by ThnxCya ) and I said to myself when I finished watching the playthrough, I will buy this game when I grow up and so I did. The game is absolutely amazing, I can just sit back and relax, enjoying the view of the ranch. I can't recommend this game enough, it's simply , fun and cozy, exactly what you need from it.

P.S. Game is absolutely great.
it is just the fact that there is exploration and farms and a lot of different things just make it amazing

Loved this game <3 And felt very accomplished for getting all the achievements to add it to my showcase. Movement and controls were easy to handle, and there's just something satisfying about vacuuming things up. The ranching is cute too. the map is huge, i recommend the interactive maps folks have made, very helpful. Pity it's not multiplayer, that would've been fun too, i bet.

This games was my childhood, playing with my friend in their house while his mom shouted at us that the 45 minutes play time ended. 

It's an amazing game, don't get me wrong, but it doesn't have the best support for MacOS. And if you're looking to mod the game, and on Mac, just don't, because it will not work. This issue isn't from the game side, but mods definitely makes it a lot better. In addition, I grew up, so the whole slime thing just doesn't sit right.

When I was a kid: 8/10 games
Now: 5/10 games, gets boring quickly

Bought it when I was younger when i first saw jack play it on his channel. This game is pure bliss on a screen with several colorful scenes & cuddly goobers to meet in each one, along with a story that if you follow it might jerk a tear or two out of your seeing holes.
10/10 I might be 1000 miles away, but i can always come home to the range
